name: AutoParts ERP (.NET 9 + React Vite)
postCreateCommand: mkdir -p 'C:/NuGetPackages/questpdf/2024.12.3/LatoFont' && touch 'C:/NuGetPackages/questpdf/2024.12.3/LatoFont/Lato-Regular.ttf' 'C:/NuGetPackages/questpdf/2024.12.3/LatoFont/Lato-Bold.ttf' 'C:/NuGetPackages/questpdf/2024.12.3/LatoFont/Lato-Italic.ttf' 'C:/NuGetPackages/questpdf/2024.12.3/LatoFont/Lato-BoldItalic.ttf' && dotnet restore && npm install --prefix frontend
